itemDescription: concept found in moral, political, and bioethical philosophy
assumption of and reliance on the honesty of another party
использование чужой истины до её обоснования
state or fact of being responsible, of having influence over certain events and potentially bearing the burden of their consequences
dialogue between two or more people or parties intended to reach a beneficial outcome
коммуникация между сторонами для достижения своих целей
transitional phase between childhood and adulthood
получение нескольких частей из одного целого
process of separating one entity to form others; often: separation within an organization that leads to the formation of an independent organisation
